name: Trivia Crack
author: Poki
description: Trivia Crack is a quiz game where you answer questions about a ton of different categories. There's Sports, Entertainment, Art, History and many more, so there's always a new category to discover. Trivia Crack has three unique game modes to choose from! First is Classic Mode, in which you have to answer a question from a random category each turn In Challenge mode, you pick your favorite topic and see how many questions in a row you can get right! And finally there's Party Mode in which you and up to 6 other players can fight out who's the smartest! Don't worry if you get stuck, there's a bunch of helpful options to help you get past a difficult question. Let's see how smart you are! How to play Trivia Crack? Use the mouse to select your topic and pick the right answer! Who created Trivia Crack? Trivia Crack is created by Play.Works. Play their other game on Poki: Rocket Road ! How can I play Trivia Crack for free? You can play Trivia Crack for free on Poki. Can I play Trivia Crack on mobile devices and desktop? Trivia Crack can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
